data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Data protection through encryption protocols to ensure privacy and security across communications.

data.title: Authentication and Authorization
data.description: Robust identity verification processes to protect user accounts.

data.title: Network Security Architecture
data.description: Layered security protocols designed to protect against unauthorized access and attacks.

data.title: Data Loss Prevention (DLP)
data.description: Technologies and processes deployed to prevent data breaches and unauthorized data transfers.
data.technical_spec: Endpoint protection, data encryption, monitoring tools.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Ongoing security assessments to identify vulnerabilities and improve defenses.
data.technical_spec: Penetration testing, vulnerability scanning, audit trails.
